'''Lady Valarian's Palace''' was the palace of the [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] Lady [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]]. It was located in [[Mos Entha/Legends|Mos Entha]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and was a block away from the [[City/Legends|city's]] [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police]] station.
